Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}All right, I'm getting fancy today and adding an egg to my order![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You get a lot of bang for your buck here. Man, I can't remember the last time I had such a fresh egg.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}{f 5 13 18 5 115}No, I meant my siblings. Four of them, actually. I look after them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Our apartment's pretty small, though, so we're packed like sardines.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You wanna come over sometime? Might be fun, as long as the floor doesn't collapse![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}{f 5 13 18 5 115}Haha, you could say that. You wouldn't believe how hot it gets in the summer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I never mentioned this, but my father died five years ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'm not fishing for sympathy or anything, I... I just thought you should know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase told me about his family situation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He's going through some tough times...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're getting closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Whoa, it's already this late? The preschool's gonna be letting out soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting dark, so I should head home.[n]{f 1 1}
